description.line1: We've collected answers to the most common questions

whatIsTaskry.title: What is Taskry?
whatIsTaskry.content: Taskry is a task and project management platform that helps teams and individuals track progress and organize their work in one place.

whoIsTaskryFor.title: Who is Taskry for?
whoIsTaskryFor.content: Taskry is suitable for small teams, freelancers, startups, and agencies. It can also be used for personal task and project organization.

teamCollaboration.title: Does Taskry support team collaboration?
teamCollaboration.content: Yes, you can invite team members, assign tasks, leave comments, and track task progress.

dataSecurity.title: How secure is my data?
dataSecurity.content: Taskry uses modern security measures, including HTTPS, DDoS protection, regular backups, and secure authentication to help keep your data safe.

mobileSupport.title: Does Taskry work on mobile devices?
mobileSupport.content: Yes, Taskry is mobile-friendly and fully accessible through a web browser. The interface is optimized for smartphones.

freeToUse.title: Is Taskry free to use?
freeToUse.content: Yes, Taskry is completely free to use.

integrations.title: Does Taskry support integrations with other services?
integrations.content: Support for integrations with popular development, communication, and workflow automation services is planned for the future.

description.line1: Data security and stable service operation are ensured

access.title: Secure access
access.description: Secure access via HTTPS and reliable authentication mechanisms protect user connections and data.

ddos.title: DDoS protection
ddos.description: DDoS protection is enabled to ensure stable service performance even under high load.

backup.title: Backups
backup.description: Regular data backups ensure data safety and allow quick recovery when needed.

RoadmapSection.heading: What's been built and what's planned

description.line1: Features available in the current version

basic.title: Core Functionality
basic.description: Task, project, team, and client management with built‑in collaboration support.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.description: Productivity dashboard with visual analytics, task statistics, and data export.

auth.title: Sign‑in Methods
auth.description: Authentication via social networks and local services: VK, Yandex, Google, and more.

settings.title: Settings & Notifications
settings.description: Profile personalization, notification management, and user preferences.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect via API and webhooks to popular services and automation tools.

advanced.title: Enhanced Functionality
advanced.description: Upcoming features that will make working with the system even smoother and more efficient.

description.line1: Create tasks, assign assignees, and track progress.
description.line2: A simple tool for daily work.

fast.title: Fast performance
fast.description: Tasks and projects open instantly. The interface is optimized for high speed even with large amounts of data.

simple.title: Simple to use
simple.description: A clean and intuitive interface with no unnecessary complexity. You can start using it right away without any learning curve.

free.title: No subscription
free.description: The service is fully free to use, with no paid plans or hidden limitations.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: The project is open source — you can study it, use it, and contribute to its development.
